description: Letter in the hand of Moses Maimonides containing instructions for a local judge on how to retrieve the assets of a murdered merchant who left his brothers as heirs. One of the brothers brought the letters of the local judge to Moses Maimonides. Dating: ca. 1168–1204 CE, based on the years when Maimonides was active in Egypt. (Information from Goitein's indexcards)
description_he: מכתב ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
